properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v4 v8 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, yeah, yeah We lift Your name, Jesus Yeah, yeah

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You found me in my darkest hour You gave me hope and gave me life You give a love that's greater You lead me out of darkness and into Your light

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was blind but now I see Your mercy it has set me free Your favor's all around me Your radical love has found me And now I sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take my heart, Lord it is Yours Oh, it is Yours, oh, it is Yours Take my heart, Lord it is Yours Oh, it is Yours, oh, it is Yours

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No one else can save my soul No one else can make me whole (Say His name) Jesus, You have won me Your radical love surrounds me And now I sing

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Take my life, Lord it is Yours Oh, it is Yours, oh, it is Yours Take my life, Lord it is Yours Oh, it is Yours, oh, it is Yours

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm giving up my all, for You and You alone For Your sacrifice, I'm laying down my life I'm giving up my all, for You and You alone For Your sacrifice, I'm laying down my life

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The price You paid, the life You gave The cross and the grave, my sins now erased The price You paid, the life You gave The cross and the grave, my sins now erased (Lift it up)
